table_comment: Customer profiles. JOIN to orders on customer_id. customer_unique_id groups duplicate accounts for the same person.
Zip-to-coordinates mapping. Many rows per zip code. JOIN to customers on customer_zip_code_prefix.
Line items per order. Many-to-one with orders. SUM price_after_discount grouped by order_id for revenue.
Core fact table. ~298K orders. All money in EGP. Use order_month for monthly GROUP BY — GENERATED column, no DATE_TRUNC needed. Use order_quarter for quarterly aggregates.
Payment records. Multiple rows per order for installments. Filter payment_sequential = 1 for the primary payment method. seller_paid_twice = TRUE is leakage scenario seller_paid_twice.
Product catalog. JOIN to order_items on product_id.
~7800 refund records. Multiple refunds per order = duplicate_refund leakage.
~262K reviews. WARNING: multiple reviews per order possible. Use mv_leakage_dashboard (LATERAL join) to avoid row duplication.
Seller profiles. JOIN to order_items on seller_id.
One row per order. Carriers: Aramex EG, Egypt Post, Bosta, Mylerz, Voo, R2S Express.
Campaign definitions. JOIN to campaign_attribution on campaign_id.
Session logs. bounce=TRUE = single-page visit. session_duration_min is GENERATED from start/end timestamps.
Multi-turn conversation history. Load last N rows by session_id ordered by turn_index to reconstruct context window.
Inject into LLM system prompt. Provides all valid ENUM values and meanings. Prevents hallucinated filter values like WHERE order_status = 'complete'.
Prompt version control. Only one row can have is_active=TRUE (enforced by partial unique index). Load the active row system_prompt at chatbot startup.
Every chatbot query logged here. Use for debugging, prompt improvement, cost tracking. cost_usd formula: (input_tokens * 0.000003 + output_tokens * 0.000015) for gpt-4o-mini.
ML anomaly score per order. anomaly_flag = 1 means leakage detected.
Junction: one row per (order, leakage_type). PREFERRED for scenario filtering. Example: WHERE leakage_type = 'duplicate_refund'.
Inject into LLM system prompt. Guides table selection, prevents wrong JOINs.
